_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to provide host analysis for Risk Mitigation Plan (RMP) to improve customer security overall posture
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting and reviewing Data Protection Impact Assessments, identifying processing activities that present high risk to individuals, and recommending proportionate technical and organizational measures to mitigate identified risks.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-012 (SP, cosine: 0.430), SP-K-009 (SP, cosine: 0.413).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.431). Shared vocabulary: [risk]. DCWF-only terms [ability, analysis, customer, host, improve, mitigation] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, assessments, conducting, data, high, identified] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.841 (P=0.841, R=0.842). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 29-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Ability to provide host analysis for Risk Mitigation Plan (RMP) to improve custo" and "Skill in conducting and reviewing Data Protection Impact Assessments, identifyin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.449 ≈ STS 0.431 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [risk] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.1%. Shared tokens: [risk]. DCWF-only: [ability, analysis, customer, host, improve, mitigation]. WIDAI-only: [activities, assessments, conducting, data, high, identified].
